name: Version 2.15.0 - Phase Headers
changes: Added phase header item type — visual section dividers like 'PHASE 1: Candidate Experience' that organize long checklists
Phase headers have no Pass/Fail/N/A/Blocked/Up For Review buttons, no comment box, and no file upload
Phase headers don't count toward progress totals or block the 'Mark Complete' gate
New '+ Add Phase Header' button in the admin checklist editor
Step numbering only counts testable steps — headers don't consume a number
DB-level integrity: triggers reject any response or admin_review pointing at a phase_header row
Wizard mode treats headers as info slides — Next is enabled without picking a status
MCP create_checklist_items / update_checklist_item / get_checklist now expose item_type and header_label
XLSX import recognizes optional 'Type' (step | phase_header) and 'Header Label' columns
Added migration 20260427120000_add_phase_header_type.sql

name: Version 2.14.0 - Per-Project Country
changes: Added per-project Country setting — controls the default flag and dial code on the tester registration phone input
New searchable country picker on the Create and Edit Project forms (50+ countries)
Tester phone input now reads the country from the project; falls back to PH if empty
MCP create_project tool accepts an optional country ISO2 code
Added migration 20260423120000_add_country_to_projects.sql — projects.country TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PH'

name: Version 2.13.0 - Wizard Mode for Testers
changes: Added per-project 'Wizard mode' admin toggle on the Edit Project screen (off by default)
New one-step-at-a-time wizard view for testers — shows 'Step N of M', with Back and Next controls
On Next, the wizard waits for the current step's autosave to settle before advancing (no extra DB calls)
Talkpush-actor steps render as informational slides in wizard mode — no input needed, auto-marked as Pass on Next
Final step shows 'Submit & Mark Complete' instead of Next
Classic long-form view unchanged for projects without wizard mode enabled
Added migration 20260417120000_add_wizard_mode.sql — adds projects.wizard_mode boolean, default false

name: Version 2.12.0 - Blocked Status & Guide Update
changes: Added 'Blocked' button to tester checklist — distinct from 'Up For Review'
Blocked = previous step failed, can't test; Up For Review = unsure, flag for admin
Blocked prompt: 'Which step is blocking you?'
Admin progress table now shows separate Blocked and Up For Review columns
Before You Begin guide: toggle shows Hide/Show Guide label for clarity
Added status legend with icons (Pass, Fail, N/A, Blocked, Up For Review)
Added autosave reassurance: 'close and return anytime via same link'
Updated color coding: Blocked = orange, Up For Review = amber
Renamed 'Behavior Type' to 'Review Finding Type' across admin review panel
Removed 'For Retesting' from finding type — moved it to Resolution Status
Added 'User Error' as a new finding type option
Resolution Status now has 4 options: Not Yet Started, In Progress, For Retesting, Done
Updated DB column behavior_type → finding_type with full data migration
Analytics charts, PDF export, AI summary, and MCP tool updated to use new field name
Added PDF and DOCX/DOC support for tester file attachments
Testers can now attach multiple files at once per step
Clipboard paste support — paste screenshots directly into the upload zone
Added per-file delete button on attachments (hover to reveal)
Admin review panel now shows tester attachments alongside comments
Added get_admin_reviews MCP tool for AI-powered UAT result summaries
Returns non-pass items grouped by tester with behavior type, resolution status, and findings
Includes project-wide summary stats (pass/fail/N/A counts and pass rate)
Added Version History panel to the checklist editor
Admins can save named snapshots of checklist steps at any time
Restore any snapshot to replace current steps (blocked if tester responses exist)
Import now auto-saves existing steps as a snapshot before overwriting
Delete individual snapshots without affecting the live checklist
Renamed 'Actor' label to 'Tester Perspective' across all admin UI
XLSX import now accepts both 'Actor' and 'Tester Perspective' column headers
Export files now use 'Tester Perspective' as the column header
Redesigned admin homepage to show a grid of client cards
Each client card shows checklist count and status summary badges
Clicking a client navigates to a filtered checklist view
Added Back to All Clients navigation on filtered view
Search on grid filters clients; search on filtered view filters checklists
Added search and fetch MCP tools for ChatGPT Apps compatibility
Existing 10 MCP tools unchanged — Claude.ai connection unaffected
Changed 'UAT Checklist Registration' label to 'User Acceptance Testing'
Added project title as header in the test scenario card for testers
Added View Sample column with clickable hyperlinks to Detailed Results Excel export
Added remote MCP server endpoint at /api/mcp for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients
10 tools available: list/create/get projects, manage checklists, track progress, list testers
API key authentication via x-api-key header
Added Manage Clients page — add and remove client names dynamically
Client names now stored in Supabase (replaces hardcoded list)
New/Edit project forms fetch client names from database
Breadcrumb support for /admin/clients page
Analytics report: sticky anchor nav (Summary / Failures / Charts / Participation)
Analytics report: page header now shows project title, test scenario, and created date
Analytics report: Download PDF button inlined into header row (was orphaned)
Analytics report: section order changed — Steps Requiring Attention moved above charts
Analytics report: stat card accent colors unified to brand sage
Analytics report: single-category Findings replaced with a callout card
Analytics report: donut charts resized 40% smaller; zero-value legend rows dimmed
Analytics report: donut chart tooltips show value + percentage
Analytics report: progress bar is now ARIA-labeled for screen readers
Analytics report: card borders, typography, and contrast polished throughout
Migrated email sending from Resend to Brevo
Notify Testers: added checkbox UI to select specific testers
Notify Testers: removed non-pass filter — any tester can now be notified
Fixed error messages not showing after partial send failures
Fixed info API now requires admin auth (was unauthenticated)
Share tokens now use a dedicated SHARE_TOKEN_SECRET env var
Replaced any[] types in project detail page with explicit interfaces
Analytics share page now uses 60s ISR cache instead of force-dynamic
Tester checklist page: explicit column selects + parallelized fetches
Duplicate slug check replaced N sequential queries with one ILIKE
Fixed React key={index} in ActivityTimeline with stable composite key
markTestComplete now validates tester existence before updating
Reorder checklist steps now uses a single RPC (was N parallel UPDATEs)
Fixed security: progress API now requires admin authentication (was publicly accessible)
Fixed email stats in tester notifications (resolved/in-progress counts were always 0)
Replaced N×2 per-item DB writes in checklist operations with a single Supabase RPC
Regenerated Supabase types; fixed created_at nullability across admin and export files
Switched PDF export to @react-pdf/renderer — true vector PDF
PDF file size reduced from ~26MB to under 1MB
PDF now includes all 5 sections: KPI cards, donut charts, steps, table
All Steps Requiring Attention rows exported (no pagination limit in PDF)
Added company name and generated date to PDF header
Added page numbers to PDF footer
Fixed PDF export missing KPI cards and donut charts (sections 1–3 now captured)
Hidden interactive controls (scope toggle, Export XLSX, pagination) from PDF output
Improved PDF render quality: scale 2x, PNG instead of JPEG
Slug now fades in on row hover in table view (hidden at rest, no clutter)
3px left-border accent added to table rows on hover for spatial orientation
Added 3px left-border accent to project cards for visual hierarchy
Duplicate Project now shows a rename dialog before creating the copy
Added focus-visible rings to view toggle and expand/collapse buttons
Added Training Plan breadcrumb label to admin nav
Breadcrumbs now show actual client name + project title instead of URL slug
Added lightweight /api/projects/[slug]/info endpoint for breadcrumb metadata
Applied 28px/700 page title scale to admin list page heading (was 20px/600)
Consolidated Duplicate + Delete into a single ⋯ More Actions dropdown
Replaced tester delete modal with inline row confirmation
Fixed 0% progress bar track from mint to gray-200
Empty Pass/Fail/N/A/For Review cells now show muted '0'
Removed decorative rainbow gradient bar from admin nav
Upgraded project title to 28px/700 weight page-level heading
Added client name as muted uppercase overline above project title
Tester URL rendered in monospace meta style
Section headers standardized to 16px/600 (h2s)
Moved Export Steps button to Tester Progress section header row
Module column in Checklist Summary: medium gray, 500 weight, left border
Single-item card groups constrained to first column of 3-col grid
Added breadcrumb trail in the nav bar for all admin sub-pages
Renamed About nav item to Help with a question-mark icon
Removed redundant Back link from project detail page
Improved search empty state with icon, message, and Clear/New CTAs
Styled Expand/Collapse as a compact button group in card view
Added dense table view as default on admin list page
Added Table/Cards view toggle with persistent mode
Added unified ProjectStatusBadge with semantic color system
Flattened single-checklist client groups in card view
Added aggregate status summary to multi-checklist group headers
Added top-border accent and right-arrow affordance to action cards
Strengthened action card labels to 15px/600 weight
Added About dialog with full version history
Added Referrer/Vendor actor type for checklist steps
Created CHANGELOG.json with 9 retroactive versions
Applied Talkpush Sign multi-chromatic pastel palette
Switched to DM Sans font across all pages
Added StatusBadge component with focus rings
Replaced Export Results with Export Steps button
Added Complete Review button for admin workflow
Added XLSX export for Steps Requiring Attention
Parallelized queries and batched N+1 loops
Added loading skeletons and lazy-loaded Recharts
Fixed stale data with cache no-store on Supabase clients
Replaced free-text company name with fixed dropdown
Added UAT title field to projects
Added PWA support for iOS home screen installation
Grouped admin dashboard checklists by client
Expanded dashboard filter to match names and slugs
Added AI-powered UAT summary tool (GPT-5.1)
Added tester results page and review notification emails
Added activity timeline and bulk mark-as-resolved
Added training plan generator with rule-based engine
Consolidated project detail buttons into single row
Unified analytics page with publish-to-client button
Redesigned Steps Requiring Attention as 3-column cards
Added copy-for-AI clipboard button on analytics
Renamed tester comments and updated step labels
10 UI/UX polish fixes across tester and admin pages
Added Talkpush Findings Breakdown donut chart
Selective step copy and modern step number display
Fixed admin review saves and analytics score accuracy
Added 4 client-facing report sections to analytics
Added public share link for analytics page
Added For Retesting finding with score exclusion
Recalibrated UAT readiness score with admin findings
Security hardening and code quality sweep
Optimized PDF compression and scoping
Added admin-only review panel with findings/comments
Added UAT Summary Report with 4 analytics sections
Redesigned tester registration with scenario card
Added hyperlink dialog and text color picker to editor
Added Mark Test Complete button for testers
Complete UAT Checklist Web App — initial release
Admin dashboard with project management
Tester checklist with inline image previews
Card-based checklist editor with drag and reorder
Site-wide SaaS redesign with dark green branding
Before You Begin guide for testers
